config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 12/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsSAPUploadAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = 'SAP Upload'
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='User Managment'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/User')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> User')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

filename = event.file.name
	if filename <> self.custom.filename:
#	if True:
		self.custom.filename = filename
		try:
		    # Get the uploaded file from the event
		    Area_Id = self.getSibling("Area").props.value
		    if self.getSibling("TypeDropdown").props.value == 'Order':
				response = Project_VECV.SAP.OrderFileUpload.UploadOrder(event, Area_Id,self.session.custom.loggedInUser)
				if response:
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record updated successfully."
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
				else:
					state = 'error'
					message = "Order File Upload Failed."
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		    elif self.getSibling("TypeDropdown").props.value == 'Material':
					response = Project_VECV.SAP.MaterialFileUpload.UploadMaterial(event, Area_Id, self.session.custom.loggedInUser)
					if response:
						state = 'success'
						message = "Record updated successfully."
						Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
					else:
						state = 'error'
						message = "Material File Upload Failed."
						Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		    elif self.getSibling("TypeDropdown").props.value == 'BOM':
					response = Project_VECV.SAP.BOMFileUpload.BOMFileUpload(event, Area_Id, self.session.custom.loggedInUser)
					if response:
						state = 'success'
						message = "Record updated successfully."
						Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
					else:
						state = 'error'
						message = "BOM File Upload Failed."
						Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		    elif self.getSibling("TypeDropdown").props.value == 'Classification':
				response = Project_VECV.SAP.ClassificationFileUpload.ClassificationFileUpload(event, Area_Id, self.session.custom.loggedInUser)
				if response:
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record updated successfully."
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
				else:
					state = 'error'
					message = "Classification File Upload Failed."
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		except Exception as e:
			screenName ='SAP Upload'   
			filePath=str('SAPUpload')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onFileReceived')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
